journeys.persona: first-time visitor exploring the app shell

steps.title: visit gameplay hub from dashboard card
clear search and open unit database

journeys.persona: new player with no saved content yet

steps.title: watch the first replay
notes: Library was already populated on this profile — exercised the watch path instead of the empty-state CTA.

journeys.persona: player running their first quick battle

steps.title: add two units to my force

journeys.persona: player building their first custom BattleMech

steps.title: adjust heat sinks (autosave)
notes: Edits autosave to local storage; the transient Saved toast is the only save feedback.

steps.title: add a starting unit and pilot
save the campaign to the server
notes: A new campaign lives only in browser storage until the player finds the Save now card — easy to lose a campaign without noticing.

steps.title: see the mission on the missions page
notes: Launch button is enabled with the wizard-added roster.

steps.title: open the mission launch screen
notes: Launch screen reached through the mission-card Launch link.

journeys.persona: phone user finding their way around

steps.title: navigate to quick game from mobile menu

journeys.persona: player pushing a campaign from creation through a battle attempt and full sweep

steps.title: add four units and four assigned pilots
submit campaign wizard and land on dashboard
select roster and launch mission to pre-battle

Manual battle attempt reached a playable tactical state or a changed failure mode: phase unavailable; spAdvance=false; composer=false; lockIn=false; no movement error captured
Starmap loaded during the deep-play sweep without the prior canvas crash signature.

journeys.persona: host and guest proving co-op campaign and 1v1 lobby handoff surfaces

steps.title: seed host and guest vault identities
host creates and guest joins co-op campaign
skip guest ledger check because co-op join did not connect
host creates 1v1 match and guest joins lobby

findings.summary: Harness uses MULTIPLAYER_STORE=durable for Playwright; it does not reproduce the plain-dev in-memory split-store C3 path. Host campaign=campaign-1783559263159-ef2hcyd, guest campaign=none, host badge=none, guest badge=none, join error=No room code rendered for host campaign..
Guest ledger projection check was skipped because the co-op join never reached a guest campaign route.

1v1 lobby occupied=true; host alpha="Alpha #1Deep Play HostNot readyLeaveReadySet AI", host bravo="Bravo #1pid_pn1NGZkhb58PemT7DXatyUTyxxRNot readySet AI", guest alpha="Alpha #1Deep Play HostNot ready", guest bravo="Bravo #1pid_pn1NGZkhb58PemT7DXatyUTyxxRNot readyLeaveReady".

journeys.persona: campaign GM validating ledger interventions and the tactical GM dock

steps.title: add four units and four assigned pilots
submit campaign wizard and land on dashboard
open campaign GM ledger
notes: Merchant preview=ready, approval=ApprovalApproved and applied to campaign state., playerLog=Player Action LogMerchant charge corrected by +2,500.00 C-bills.Finances - approved, privateLog=GM LedgerMerchant charge corrected by +2,500.00 C-bills.Hidden campaign merchant reversal: duplicated charge from a black-market branch.Without this GM action the duplicated merchant charge remains on the campaign ledger.Merchant inventory clue remains GM-only until the players discover it in play..

steps.title: generate and approve merchant ledger correction
preview merchant conflict blocked approval
notes: Time cascade preview=2026-07-09 -> 2026-07-11 (2 days); external effects=none rendered. Current UI renders summary plus effects list, not a per-day expanded breakdown.

steps.title: return to dashboard before battle setup save
select roster and launch mission to pre-battle
open manual battle before switching to GM query mode

steps.title: preview and approve GM Advance Phase

findings.summary: Merchant correction preview and approval were captured with player/private ledger split evidence.
Merchant conflict correction was captured in the blocked approval state.
Time cascade correction was captured with the full current preview panel; UI currently exposes a summary/effects list rather than per-day breakdown.
GM Advance Phase before="Initiative" after="unknown"; phaseChanged=true, composer=false, terminal=Defeat Destruction Return to Campaign Replay Game Back to Games View Full Event Timeline, error=none.
